entities.name: DSApplicationLogs
entities.description: A central historical audit log tracking every single state change, timestamp, and user comment across the application lifecycle.

fields.name: LogId
fields.description: Unique system generated tracking code for this specific log row.

fields.name: ActorRole
fields.description: Standardized indicator of the system or human actor. Links directlyto CS_ActorRoleType.

fields.name: StatusChangedTo
fields.description: Tracks the new state of the application. Links directly to CS_StageType.

fields.name: Comments
fields.description: Long-form textual notes left by that specific actor at this exact step

fields.name: LogTimestamp
fields.description: The exact real-time second this log row was generated

fields.name: StepName
fields.description: Standardized process checkpoint indicator. Links directly to CS_StepNameType.

entities.name: DSCandidates
entities.description: The master talent CRM directory tracking the permanent identity profiles, compliance windows, and lifetime application states of job applicants.

fields.name: EmailAddress
fields.description: The primary unique email identifier used to look up historical candidate profiles.

fields.name: FullName
fields.description: The candidate's legal name, validated during the onboarding compliance document verification phase.

fields.name: CandidateId
fields.description: Natively generated unique numeric primary key used for universal relational data integrity.

entities.name: DSJobApplications
entities.description: Transactional tracking log monitoring individual application stages and manager review notes over time

fields.name: TargetJobId
fields.description: Relational database link mapping back directly to the row in DS_JobPostings.ApplicationCode.

fields.name: ApplicationDate
fields.description: Tracks the exact second the processed the applicant's submission.

fields.name: CurrentStage
fields.description: Tracks the live progress state of this application instance. Links to CS_StageType.

fields.name: InterviewerFeedback
fields.description: Unstructured text notes and score evaluations submitted by panel

fields.name: ExpectedSalary
fields.description: The candidate's requested annual or baseline gross salary expectation for this vacancy loop.

fields.name: EarliestJoinDate
fields.description: The target calendar date when the candidate is contractually or personally clear to start full employment.

fields.name: IsServingNoticePeriod
fields.description: True/False flag tracking whether the applicant is currently serving out an active resignation notification loop at their prior employer.

fields.name: NoticePeriodDays
fields.description: The remaining balance or duration of the candidate's professional notice window calculated strictly in whole integer days.

fields.name: CurrentSalary
fields.description: Current Salary of the Candidate

entities.name: DSJobPostings
entities.description: Master directory tracking open company job requisitions, capacity caps, and budgets.

fields.name: ApplicationCode
fields.description: Natively generated unique numeric primary key used for relational data integrity

fields.name: JobTitle
fields.description: The formal corporate title of the open position

fields.name: JobText
fields.description: Complete unstructured text of core responsibilities, tool requirements, and role expectations.

fields.name: SeverityLevel
fields.description: Tracks vacancy urgency to adjust live calendar booking window lookaheads. Links to CS_SeverityType.

fields.name: MaxBudget
fields.description: The maximum approved annual salary threshold allowed for this specific headcount seat.

fields.name: TotalVacancies
fields.description: The remaining maximum capacity limits for this requisition before it must be forced closed.

fields.name: TargetFillDate
fields.description: The target business deadline to successfully onboard a candidate for this open role.

fields.name: IsActive
fields.description: A binary flag that controls whether this record is searchable inside the live AI vector index.

entities.name: DSTalentCompliance
entities.description: Operational tracking ledger used to enforce global hiring policies, cool-down timelines, and candidate eligibility states company-wide

fields.name: ComplianceId
fields.description: Unique system generated tracking code for this compliance entry.

fields.name: LastInterviewDate
fields.description: Tracks the candidate's latest interview panel timestamp to enforce the 6-month cooldown rule.

fields.name: CandidateStatus
fields.description: Tracks global applicant eligibility for corporate hiring routing. Links to CS_TalentStatusType

choicesets.name: CSActorRoleType
choicesets.description: Enforces a standardized list of automated systems and human user roles authorized to execute actions or leave comments inside the recruitment pipeline.

choicesets.name: CSSeverityType
choicesets.description: Global enumeration used to track the business criticality and urgency level of a corporate job requisition. This selection dynamically alters the lookahead window parameters used by background robot activities during the real-time calendar slot lookup phase.

choicesets.name: CSStageType
choicesets.description: Transactional status tracking system used to monitor and display the active real-time operational phase of an individual job application lifecycle across the orchestration canvas.

choicesets.name: CSStepNameType
choicesets.description: Enforces a standardized list of operational process checkpoints across the recruitment and onboarding workflow to ensure clean data analytics.

choicesets.name: CSTalentStatusType
choicesets.description: Core compliance and eligibility ledger used to govern candidate pipeline routing rules based on corporate policies, global interview timelines, and past verification results.
